questions.question: ___ you play games? (一般動詞・現在)
questions.explanation: 一般動詞の現在形の疑問文は Do/Does で始めます

questions.question: ___ you play games yesterday? (一般動詞・過去)
questions.explanation: 一般動詞の過去形の疑問文は Did で始めます

questions.question: ___ you play games tomorrow? (一般動詞・未来)
questions.explanation: 一般動詞の未来形の疑問文は Will で始めます

questions.question: ___ you happy? (be動詞・現在)
questions.explanation: be動詞の疑問文はbe動詞を前に出します

questions.question: ___ you happy yesterday? (be動詞・過去)
questions.explanation: be動詞の疑問文はbe動詞を前に出します

questions.question: ___ you playing games now? (進行形)
questions.explanation: 進行形の疑問文はbe動詞を前に出します

questions.question: ___ she play games? (三人称・現在)
questions.explanation: 三人称単数の疑問文は Does で始めます

questions.question: ___ he happy? (be動詞・現在)
questions.explanation: 三人称単数のbe動詞の疑問文は Is で始めます
